title: spiloxene aquatica
intro: Spiloxene aquatica, also known as water violet, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues, including skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Spiloxene aquatica include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, promote wound healing, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", Spiloxene aquatica (also known as Liriope spicata) benefits include extending sleep duration and immobility time, reducing sleep latency, and exhibiting sedative and hypnotic effects.
